meta.description: Simulated spin trace-distance dynamics — RSS initialisation check
meta.system: spin-1/2 + single motional mode + Markovian bath
meta.note: Illustrative simulation. Pre-registration pending. Not experimental data.

rss_check.description: Spin initialised in RSS. Motion initialised thermal at n_bar=5. Trace distance D(rho_spin(t), rho_ss) should start near zero, rise, then return.

mpemba_scenario.description: Two initial states: A (farther, D0=0.45) and B (closer, D0=0.22). Mpemba scenario: A crosses below B.
